name: memory
notes: Read-write knowledge graph; several tools, good for testing discovery.

name: sequential-thinking
description: Dynamic, reflective problem-solving via step-by-step thinking.

name: github
underlyingService: The MCP server is free/open-source, but requires a GitHub account and a personal access token.
notes: Token needs repo/read scopes depending on what you query.

name: filesystem
description: Read/write files under one or more allowed directories. Append the allowed path(s) as args: `nexus add filesystem -- <abs-path>` (or edit config).
notes: Needs at least one absolute allowed-directory argument. Example: nexus add filesystem -- /Users/you/docs

name: example-remote
description: Template for a remote (Streamable HTTP) MCP server.
notes: Template — replace 'url' (and add --header Authorization=...) before using.
